textByHash.4eef801152f7b87be81ff9f3645bb5d1371a8eac: Okay, just walk north-east when you leave this house, and soon you'll reach the big city of Falador.
textByHash.58f52a64e8bf55c95bc5c8e8dff88db760e1d414: Hello sir. What are you doing in my house?
textByHash.8de00c835706f7d54532ffe2ea44a6c513f5554c: Oh? Well, would you mind wandering somewhere else? This is my house.
textByHash.dda08181fc877cb4fda556f997d4ae391420b254: I don't have much on me...
